Gate.io Startup-LTD TOKEN $10,000 Giveaway

Complete the tasks  to share $10,000 in rewards

💰Prize: 20 lucky winners, $500 each.


No Gate.io account yet? 

  CLICK TO REGISTER  


💎 

New users who participate in Gate.io Startup during the event have a chance to share $100


【Note】

  • The rewards will be distributed in $LTD.
  • KYC2 needs to be completed by the end of the event to receive rewards.
  • Other than new users who register during the event, candidates need to deposit no less than $2000 or trade no less than $2000(spot trading) from 2024-8-17 to 2024-9-1 to win rewards.
  • The winner list will be announced on Gate.io News Telegram Channel.
  • The rewards will be distributed within 14 working days after the event ends.
  • Every user can only win one reward every 7 days.
  • The use of duplicate accounts and any other cheating behaviour is strictly prohibited.
  • *Please be noted that we may restrict or prohibit the use of all or a portion of the Services (including the participation in this event, game or competition) from Restricted Locations, including but not limited to the United Kingdom, United States of America, Mainland China, Singapore, Canada, France, Germany, Hong Kong, Lithuania, Malaysia, Malta, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, Syria, Crimea Region, Spain, Luhansk, Donetsk, Netherlands, Bolivia and so on.

Terms & Conditions

Complete the tasks  to share $10,000 in rewards
🎁 $500 each to 20 winners

【Note】
  1. The rewards will be distributed in $LTD.
  2. KYC2 needs to be completed by the end of the event to receive rewards.
  3. Other than new users who register during the event, candidates need to deposit no less than $20 or trade no less than $2000(spot trading) from 2024-8-17 to 2024-9-1 to win rewards.
  4. The winner list will be announced on Gate.io News Telegram Channel.
  5. The rewards will be distributed within 14 working days after the event ends.
  6. Every user can only win one reward every 7 days.
  7. The use of duplicate accounts and any other cheating behaviour is strictly prohibited.
  8. *Please be noted that we may restrict or prohibit the use of all or a portion of the Services (including the participation in this event, game or competition) from Restricted Locations, including but not limited to the United Kingdom, United States of America, Mainland China, Singapore, Canada, France, Germany, Hong Kong, Lithuania, Malaysia, Malta, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, Sudan, Syria, Crimea Region, Spain, Luhansk, Donetsk, Netherlands, Bolivia and so on.


Platform Disclaimer

This Sweepstakes is powered by Crowd9 PTY LTD ("Gleam"). Gleam does not sponsor, administer, endorse or bear liability for this promotion. By entering the Sweepstakes, you agree to Gleam's Privacy Policy
